title: woof docs-paths mapping
description: Project-side declaration at .woof/docs-paths.toml. Tells Stage 5 Check 8 (docs drift) which doc paths are required when given code paths are touched. Each mapping says: 'if a story modifies any file matching code_pattern, the same diff must include a change to a file matching doc_pattern'. Stage 5 Check 8 is a no-op when this file is absent.

mappings.description: Ordered list of code-to-doc requirements. All matching mappings apply to a given diff.

code_pattern.description: Glob pattern for code paths that trigger this requirement (e.g. 'webapp/api/**/*.py').

doc_pattern.description: Glob pattern for required doc paths (e.g. 'docs/api/**/*.md'). Stage 5 Check 8 fails when code_pattern matched files exist in the diff but no doc_pattern file does.

rationale.description: Why this mapping exists. Helps gate conversations when the rule fires.
